de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort

Interface Sort

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Named
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractSort, ArraySort, GenericSort, NullSort, ProgramSVSort, ProgramSVSort.ArrayInitializerSVSort, ProgramSVSort.ArrayLengthSort, ProgramSVSort.ArrayPostDeclarationSort, ProgramSVSort.CatchSort, ProgramSVSort.ConstantProgramVariableSort, ProgramSVSort.ExecutionContextSort, ProgramSVSort.ExpressionSort, ProgramSVSort.ExpressionSpecialPrimitiveTypeSort, ProgramSVSort.ForLoopSort, ProgramSVSort.ForUpdatesSort, ProgramSVSort.GuardSort, ProgramSVSort.LabelSort, ProgramSVSort.LeftHandSideSort, ProgramSVSort.LocalVariableSort, ProgramSVSort.LoopInitSort, ProgramSVSort.MetaClassReferenceSort, ProgramSVSort.MethodBodySort, ProgramSVSort.MethodNameSort, ProgramSVSort.MultipleVariableDeclarationSort, ProgramSVSort.NewArraySVSort, ProgramSVSort.NonModelMethodBodySort, ProgramSVSort.NonSimpleExpressionNoClassReferenceSort, ProgramSVSort.NonSimpleExpressionSort, ProgramSVSort.NonSimpleMethodReferenceSort, ProgramSVSort.NonSimpleNewSVSort, ProgramSVSort.NonStringLiteralSort, ProgramSVSort.ProgramMethodSort, ProgramSVSort.ProgramVariableSort, ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionNonStringObjectSort, ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionSort, ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionSpecialPrimitiveTypeSort, ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionStringSort, ProgramSVSort.SimpleNewSVSort, ProgramSVSort.SpecialConstructorReferenceSort, ProgramSVSort.StatementSort, ProgramSVSort.StaticVariableSort, ProgramSVSort.StringLiteralSort, ProgramSVSort.SwitchSVSort, ProgramSVSort.TypeReferenceNotPrimitiveSort, ProgramSVSort.TypeReferenceSort, ProxySort, SortImpl

    public interface Sort
extends Named

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static Sort ANY
      Any is a supersort of all sorts.
      static Name CAST_NAME 
      static Name EXACT_INSTANCE_NAME 
      static Sort FORMULA
      Formulas are represented as "terms" of this sort.
      static Name INSTANCE_NAME 
      static Sort TERMLABEL
      Term labels are represented as "terms" of this sort.
      static Sort UPDATE
      Updates are represented as "terms" of this sort.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String declarationString() 
      ImmutableSet<Sort> extendsSorts()
      Returns the direct supersorts of this sort.
      ImmutableSet<Sort> extendsSorts(Services services)
      Returns the direct supersorts of this sort.
      boolean extendsTrans(Sort s)
      Tells whether the given sort is a reflexive, transitive subsort of this sort.
      SortDependingFunction getCastSymbol(TermServices services)
      returns the cast symbol of this Sort
      SortDependingFunction getExactInstanceofSymbol(TermServices services)
      returns the exactinstanceof symbol of this Sort
      SortDependingFunction getInstanceofSymbol(TermServices services)
      returns the instanceof symbol of this Sort
      boolean isAbstract()
      Tells whether this sort has no exact elements.

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.Named

        name

        static final Sort FORMULA
        Formulas are represented as "terms" of this sort.

    • Method Detail

      • extendsSorts

        ImmutableSet<Sort> extendsSorts()
        Returns the direct supersorts of this sort. Not supported by NullSort.

      • extendsSorts

        ImmutableSet<Sort> extendsSorts(Services services)
        Returns the direct supersorts of this sort.

      • extendsTrans

        boolean extendsTrans(Sort s)
        Tells whether the given sort is a reflexive, transitive subsort of this sort.

      • isAbstract

        boolean isAbstract()
        Tells whether this sort has no exact elements.

      • getCastSymbol

        SortDependingFunction getCastSymbol(TermServices services)
        returns the cast symbol of this Sort

      • getInstanceofSymbol

        SortDependingFunction getInstanceofSymbol(TermServices services)
        returns the instanceof symbol of this Sort

        SortDependingFunction getExactInstanceofSymbol(TermServices services)
        returns the exactinstanceof symbol of this Sort
